changelog: HushTV Canada — Canada-branded clone of the Official build. Functionally identical: same features, same Xtream login flow, same Moods & Themes catalog, same Sports rail. Installs side-by-side with HushTV / HushTV Official on the same device (separate applicationId: com.hushtv.tv.canada).
OTA updates pulled from https://hushtv.xyz/version-canada.json — this app updates itself independently of the Dev and Official channels.
